title: Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple
tagline: Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam, the 276 temples that find mention in it. topPlaces.name: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tiru Anniyur.

topPlaces.name: Anandathandavapuram
topPlaces.description: Anandathandavapuram, formerly known as Kancharu Tamil pronunciation: [Kañcāṟu], is a village located in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu. The nearest town, Mayiladuthurai is located five kilometers, southerly.

topPlaces.name: Parimala Ranganatha Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Parimala Ranganathar Perumal Temples or Tiruindaloor is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located in Thiruvilandur of Mayiladuthurai, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered in Nalayira Divya Prabandham by the 12 poet saints, or the Alvars.

topPlaces.name: Koranad
topPlaces.description: Koranad (formerly known as Koorainadu ) is an affluent commercial and residential neighbourhood in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is surrounded by Kamarajar colony in the North, Dharmapuram in the East, Srinivasapuram in the South, and Sithkarkadu and Sholampettai in the West.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai block
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai block is a revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 54 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai taluk
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai taluk is a taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the district is the town of Mayiladuthurai and villages include Agarakkirangudi, Elanthangudi and Mozhaiyur.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) is a Special Grade Municipality and the district headquarters of Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located 256 km (159 mi) from the state capital, Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai dry fish market
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai dry fish market, also known as the Karuvattu Sandhai or Mayavaram Karuvattu Sandhai, is a dedicated dry fish market operating in town Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tiru Anniyur.

It is one of the Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered in Nalayira Divya Prabandham by the 12 poet saints, or the Alvars.

Koranad (formerly known as Koorainadu ) is an affluent commercial and residential neighbourhood in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is surrounded by Kamarajar colony in the North, Dharmapuram in the East, Srinivasapuram in the South, and Sithkarkadu and Sholampettai in the West.
Mayiladuthurai block is a revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 54 panchayat villages in this block.

Mayiladuthurai taluk is a taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the district is the town of Mayiladuthurai and villages include Agarakkirangudi, Elanthangudi and Mozhaiyur.

Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) is a Special Grade Municipality and the district headquarters of Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located 256 km (159 mi) from the state capital, Chennai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (108 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Korukkai Veeratteswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple, Anandathandavapuram, Parimala Ranganatha Perumal Temple, Koranad, Mayiladuthurai block.
